steps.title: Convert square feet to square meters
steps.content:
Since $1 \text{ meter} = 3.28 \text{ feet}$, squaring both sides gives:
$$1 \text{ m}^2 = (3.28)^2 \text{ ft}^2 = 10.7584 \text{ ft}^2$$
So: $1 \text{ ft}^2 = \frac{1}{10.7584} \text{ m}^2$

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘$0.39$’: $0.387 \approx 0.39$. Closest to our calculated value. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘$1.27$’: This results from using $3.28$ ft/m instead of squaring it to convert square feet to square meters: $250 \div (3.28 \times 60) \approx 1.27$. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘$13.67$’: This would result from dividing by 60 and multiplying by 3.28 (not squaring). ✗
  • Choice D — ‘$23.24$’: This results from converting square feet to square meters but forgetting to convert hours to minutes: $250 \div 10.7584 \approx 23.24$. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
